title: Amauropelta campii
taxonomy: Amauropelta campii is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, a family of ferns. This species belongs to the genus Amauropelta, which is a group of ferns native to South America. Amauropelta campii is further classified into the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The kingdom to which Amauroperta campii belongs is Plantae, encompassing all flowering plants, conifers, and ferns. Amauropelta campii's taxonomy places it within the larger group of vascular plants, characterized by the presence of a vascular system.
